description: Homebox home inventory: search, intake, warranties, attachments, locations, tags, QR labels
name: io.github.dgahagan/homebox-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Homebox instance (>= 0.26), e.g. https://homebox.example.com
environmentVariables.name: HOMEBOX_URL

environmentVariables.description: Homebox API key (Profile -> API Keys, starts with hb_)
environmentVariables.name: HOMEBOX_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional: name of one custom field treated as a stable item identifier for lookups
environmentVariables.name: HOMEBOX_ALIAS_FIELD

environmentVariables.description: Optional: directory where label/QR PNGs are saved (default: current directory)
environmentVariables.name: HOMEBOX_LABEL_DIR
